commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human handling is needed because this external PR still needs real behavior proof and the proposed cache hit has blocking validation/security defects.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a supply-chain regression by letting an existing managed package directory bypass the normal plugin validation and scan contract.; Review finding: [P1] Validate cached packages before returning success — src/plugins/install.ts:482... (sha=e2f4166b5bb23023e142593184692985aaf7cc33)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an install-mode fast path in `installPluginFromManagedNpmRoot` that skips npm install when an existing package version is equal to or newer than the requested npm version, plus unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main computes the managed npm target and calls `ensureInstallTargetAvailableForMode` before any installed-version comparison, and the duplicate-install test asserts install mode rejects existing targets.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed because this external PR still needs real behavior proof and the proposed cache hit has blocking validation/security defects.

target.title: fix(plugins/install): skip reinstall when installed plugin version satisfies requested
target.author: hclsys

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
